mapper.insert: INSERT INTO party_invite (party_id, inviter_id, invitee_id, status, created_at) VALUES (#{partyId}, #{inviterId}, #{inviteeId}, #{status}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO party_invite ( party_id, inviter_id, invitee_id, status, created_at ) VALUES
( #{invite.partyId}, #{invite.inviterId}, #{invite.inviteeId}, #{invite.status}, #{invite.createdAt} )
